Mere Problem aur Peace dono
Happiest Birthday Shivam😌 Hiie Babyyy 💗❤️.. Wishing you a very, very happiest birthday 💗🧿🩷... ahh, you've turned 21 and I'm 19 yet… now I can call you grandpa 😁😋.. gonna love this date... you came into my life, did everything for me to make me happy, saw every side of mine, you saw everything... and still you chose me.. I love you, baby, so muchh ✨❤️.. didn’t know you’d become so special to me when we started to talk.. I always knew that we were going to end up as partners.. I always knew ki I’m in love with you 🥹❤️.. you mean the world to me... I lovee youu babyyy soo muchhhhhhh 🥰❤️❤️.. well.. you’re always gonna be my baby.. the one I’m always gonna pamper & love.. the day you came into my life... I just started to feel happy, you make me happy, calm, excited, and give me the weird feeling of hugging you all the time.. you’re my home ❤️🫂 andddd I’m soo gladd to have you in my life... you know this 23rd of April will always be my fav date... gonna light a diya on this day and gonna pray for you, for us every year, baby 🧿❤️🫂.. you’re my cutie patootie.. and you’re always gonna be ✨❤️🫂.. and yeahhh... always be happy & stay healthy.. otherwise I’m gonna kick your ass 🗿.. and yeah, do enjoy your b’day, baby.. be the happiest person for today.. and I love you so muchh ✨❤️🫂 One more thing, baby, thank you so much for always being here for me.. for always taking care of me, for always handling my mood swings, for always choosing me over & over, for always taking care of this stupid child who’s helplessly in love with you😩💓.. and yeahhh, one day I’m gonna marry youu😁❤️... so you better be ready for it.. and yeah, once again, happiest 21st birthday, babyy🧿❤️✨❤️🫂... you’re the chaos of my silent world, the happiness I always wanted, I love you, baby 🫂❤️✨ You’re my home ✨❤️ My cute lil baby 🧿✨
— Forever yours, 🌸
